title: Org Sync
description: Automatically sync departments and members from WeChat Work, Feishu and other systems.
emptyHint: No sync sources configured yet. Click the button above to create one.

form.providerImmutable: The provider cannot be changed after creation.

wecom.corpsecretMaskedHint: Leave blank or keep **** to preserve the stored secret
wecom.corpsecretEditHint: The masked placeholder keeps the stored secret on save.
wecom.corpsecretCannotBeMasked: A real secret is required when creating a new config.
wecom.agentIdPlaceholder: The application AgentId from the WeChat Work console
wecom.allowDeptIdsHint: Leave empty to use WeChat Work root (id=1). Integers only; add each root separately.
wecom.allowDeptIdsPlaceholder: Type an integer then click Add

feishu.appSecretMaskedHint: Leave blank or keep **** to preserve the stored secret
feishu.appSecretCannotBeMasked: A real secret is required when creating a new config.

generic.endpointUrlInvalid: URL must start with http:// or https://
generic.apiKeyMaskedHint: Leave blank or keep **** to preserve the stored key

confirmExecute.title: Run Sync Now?
confirmExecute.desc: Syncing “{{name}}” will fetch the latest departments and members; related data may change during the run.

confirmDelete.title: Delete this config?
confirmDelete.desc: After deleting “{{name}}” future syncs stop. Previously synced data is kept.

executeSuccess.title: Sync job dispatched
executeSuccess.desc: Running in the background. Check the sync log for progress.
